prompt: Create a high-end fashion magazine cover: a beautiful young Miao woman with a fresh facial look, exuding style, confidence, and elegance. She wears vibrantly colored Yunnan Miao traditional clothing, dominated by rose red, blue, and green, featuring exquisite ethnic embroidery, a short-sleeved top, an apron-style front waist decoration, a pleated miniskirt, colorful patterned trim, silver headwear, and ethnic accessories. The background is a minimalist and high-end fashion magazine scene with Shanghai urban elements, leaving white space for the title and layout. The overall quality is that of an international fashion editorial. Full-body standing pose, lightly lifting the skirt to highlight the ethnic details. High-end studio lighting, sharp and clear image, ultra-clear details, photorealistic, editorial-grade cover design, vertical composition.
